title: 阪神JFの後に・注目のウマ娘

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon does a great job at the Hanshin J.F.
This not only piques the audience's interest in
her, but also delights the younger students who
come to watch, pushing Hishi Amazon's drive to a
new high.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, I'm troubled over about whether we
should pursue the Triple Tiara tour or the Classic
Triple Crown tour...
